name: Public Cloud Business Unit
description: SEC-reportable segment. Service-centric, capital-light model providing managed services, elastic engineering, and professional services for customer environments on AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. FY2024 revenue ~$1.68B with bookings growing 22% YoY. Q3 2025 revenue turned positive at +1% YoY — the first growth quarter after multi-year decline. FY2025 priorities: sustain 20%+ bookings growth; achieve positive revenue growth in all four quarters; grow data and AI services to 15%+ of ACV; execute 500+ customer workload migrations via Migration Factory; maintain AWS Premier Partner tier in all regions and Azure Expert MSP designation (ctr-029). Led by D K Sinha (President, appointed Jul 2022). SVP Services & Delivery: Phani Kishore Burre (appointed Nov 2025). com/newsroom.

provenance.primary_data_source: Rackspace Technology organizational structure, SEC filings 2024
provenance.assessed_by: KG Enrichment Agent — Org Unit Batch

name: Private Cloud Business Unit
description: SEC-reportable segment. Technology-forward, capital-intensive model providing managed services for customer environments in Rackspace data centers, customer DCs, or third-party facilities. FY2024 revenue ~$1.05B (-13% YoY) with H2 2024 bookings growing 42% vs H1 — signaling a demand inflection after years of decline. Q3 2025 revenue -3% YoY; Q4 2025 guidance flat sequential, tracking toward the guided flat H2 2025 revenue trajectory. FY2025 priorities: achieve flat revenue YoY in H2 2025; win 250+ net new logos in healthcare and public sector verticals; close 5+ sovereign and custom cloud contracts in regulated markets; complete VMware Broadcom ELA transition by Q2. Brian Lillie (President) departed Jan 2025; CEO assumed interim leadership; Lance Weaver serves as CPTO. com/newsroom Jan 2025.

name: Commercial Organization
description: Strategic and alliance partner relationships, customer success, and commercial strategy. Neil Emerson serves as Chief Commercial Officer. 400+ quota-bearing sales representatives and customer success managers per 10-K FY2024. Elevated customer churn in the managed cloud segment has been disclosed as a risk factor in FY2022, FY2023, and FY2024 10-K filings. FY2025 priorities: reduce managed cloud gross churn below 12% annualized; hire VP Customer Success and build CSM function to 80 headcount; deploy Gainsight health scoring to 100% of enterprise accounts by Q2; improve NPS by 15+ points from FY2024 baseline; generate $25M+ net expansion ARR through structured TAM-driven upsell plays. Seattle Children's Hospital 10-year MSA (ctr-017) is a reference flagship outcome of this approach.

name: Rackspace Government Solutions
description: Specialized division for federal, state, local, and education (SLED) customers. FedRAMP JAB-authorized since 2015; 23 FedRAMP authorizations. DoD SRG IL2/IL4, DFARS/CMMC, FISMA, IRS Pub 1075, HIPAA, and TAC 202 compliance. Serves more than half of Federal Government cabinet agencies. Contract vehicles include SEWP V (ctr-027) and GSA MAS (ctr-026). Partners with SMPL-C for CMMC compliance (Aug 2025). FY2025 priorities: grow federal managed cloud ARR 20%+ YoY; achieve DoD IL4 JAB authorization for at least one service offering; win 3+ new agency task orders under SEWP V; complete CMMC Level 2 certification; expand Reston Federal Office (site-002) cleared workforce to 150 personnel. Rick Rosenburg serves as VP & GM. Operates from Reston, VA (site-002). com/industry/government, FedRAMP marketplace, 10-K FY2024, globenewswire Aug 2025 SMPL-C partnership.

Palantir partnership (ctr-018) extends delivery to Foundry and AIP in production with 30 engineers scaling to 250+. FY2025 priorities: scale to $50M+ AI services ARR; achieve 50+ AIDE production enterprise deployments; reach 100+ active FAIR implementations; close 200+ Microsoft Copilot Services engagements; achieve Palantir AIP Gold delivery partner status. Platform support across AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure. com/newsroom Jun 2023 FAIR announcement, fair.rackspace.com, Q4 2024 earnings call, Palantir partnership press release.

name: Information Security Organization
description: Enterprise information security function headed by a Chief Security Officer (CSO) who reports to the President - AI, Technology and Sustainability (Srini Koushik). CSO has 20+ years of experience in information security leadership with large technology, healthcare, and financial institutions; holds BS from Arizona State University; with Rackspace since 2019. Provides quarterly updates to Audit Committee. Cross-functional group of security, risk, and compliance personnel meets regularly. Encompasses CSOC (Customer Security Operations Center) and ISOC (Internal Security Operations Center). com 10-K disclosure analysis.

name: Internal Data & Analytics Organization
description: Internal data modernization team that consolidated 70 data warehouses and reduced 400 dashboards to 20. Implemented sAFE (Scaled Agile Framework for Enterprises) methodology improving velocity from 91 days to 17 days. Built churn risk prediction model synthesizing account movement and opportunity data for customer success teams. Established ISO-like stamp certifying data quality, standardized data definitions and governance. Maintains PCI and GDPR compliance controls and internal retention policies in data operations. com/case-studies/rackspace-technology-0 (internal data modernization case study).

name: Sustainability & ESG Organization
description: Sustainability function within AI, Technology & Sustainability organization under Srini Koushik. Achieved SBTi validation of near-term and long-term net-zero emissions targets in 2025. Goals: 50% emissions reduction by 2032, 90% by 2045. Achieved 10% total emissions reduction 2023-2024 (20% Scope 1&2, 9% Scope 3). 80% of global DCs powered by renewable energy. RE100 member. Co-authored SustainableIT.org 'IT Toolkit for Responsible and Sustainable AI'. Formalized circular IT lifecycle asset disposal policy. Third-party audited Scope 1,2,3 emissions baseline. com/newsroom 2025 Sustainability Report Oct 21 2025, globenewswire.com 2025 Sustainability Report.

name: Managed Security Services
description: Customer-facing security services organization delivering Rackspace Managed XDR, security monitoring, vulnerability management, and compliance services. Distinct from internal Information Security Organization (CSO function). Services include managed detection and response (MDR), next-gen SOC services, strategic security services, and technical security services. ISG Provider Lens 2025 Leader in three cybersecurity categories. RAISE (Rackspace AI Security Engine) launched Aug 2025 for AI-driven threat detection within Rackspace Cyber Defense Center. com/newsroom RAISE launch Aug 20 2025, ISG Provider Lens 2025 Cybersecurity report.

description: Specialized practice within FAIR delivering enterprise AI agent solutions. Launched FAIR MCP Enterprise Accelerator on AWS Marketplace in AI Agents & Tools category (Jul 2025). Builds multi-agent architectures with advanced reasoning, memory retention, secure code interpretation, and multimodal data processing on Amazon Bedrock. rackspace.com MCP Accelerator announcement Jul 17 2025, globenewswire.com Sema4.ai partnership Jun 18 2025.

name: Rackspace Government Solutions, Inc.
description: Separate legal entity for U.S. federal government cloud services. Holds FedRAMP Joint Authorization Board (JAB) authorization since 2015, DoD Impact Level 4 authorization, and DFARS compliance. Serves 40+ federal, state, and local government agencies. Security Services for Government Clouds team consists of 100% U.S. citizens based in continental U.S. locations (requirement for government contracts). FedRAMP authorization is entity-specific and cannot be transferred to other entities without complete re-authorization (12-18 month process). Change of control or entity restructuring would trigger immediate loss of authorization and government customer churn.", "properties": {"unit_type": "Legal Entity", "jurisdiction": "United States", "compliance_certifications": ["FedRAMP Moderate JAB P-ATO", "DoD SRG IL4", "DFARS", "CMMC"], "government_customers": "40+", "founded": 2015}

name: Rackspace UK Sovereign Services
description: UK-based sovereign cloud services for UK government, NHS, police, and regulated financial services/pharma customers. Launched March 2024. VMware Sovereign Cloud certified January 2026. Architecturally isolated from global Rackspace network. Separate multi-tenant PODs for UK healthcare (Class V risk data), government, police, and regulated industries. Data residency locked to UK borders per post-Brexit data sovereignty requirements and UK FCA/PRA regulations. Platforms and support teams isolated from global network. Partnership with BT for sovereign communications.
